title: Vexatious
description: Vexes die on death by summoner
body:
A mod that automatically kills any vexes when their summoner evoker gets killed/dies. Mod is not written by me, but by cputnam-a11y on github by request of me. If you have any issues, please don´t ask me, i have little to no experience in coding i´m just publishing the mod for public use.

NEEDS FABRIC API
